steps.title: Use the confirmation signal
steps.content: The second sentence says Duchamp's Fountain "did just that," meaning it fulfilled the intention stated in the first sentence: challenging prevailing ideas about art.

steps.title: Reject other transitions
steps.content: A adds a separate point, but the sentence confirms the previous one. B signals a comparison that is not being made. C signals contrast or replacement, which conflicts with "did just that." The answer is D.
